title: Proof mode command — normalize appearance/status bar/render waits and capture an artifact bundle
description:
Add a first-class proof mode command that sets up a deterministic screenshot environment, launches or deep-links the app, waits for render, and stores a proof bundle with metadata.

Acceptance criteria:
- one command can normalize appearance, status bar, and render wait before capture
- proof output includes screenshot path and machine-readable metadata
- proof mode works for both iOS and Android sessions
- failures stop before invalid proof is captured
acceptanceCriteria: proof mode normalizes device state before capture
proof output includes screenshot and metadata
proof mode works for iOS and Android
